verdict: Shu-ilishu contact-zone filter (Phase-27): 138 Phase-25e candidate inscriptions (length 3-7) resolved via catalogue_id. 0 are from contact-zone sites; 138 are from Indus-core sites. NOTE: the current indus_cisi corpus (179 inscriptions, all from Mohenjo-daro) does NOT include any contact-zone seals -- those are only in CISI Vol 3 Part 3 plates (not yet ingested with sign sequences).
